dict.string: {"Selection":{"Editor":"Xcode3BuildSettingsEditor","Target":"Gate2Go","Xcode3BuildSettingsEditorLocations":[{"Collapsed Build Property Categories":["\u0001Deployment||INSTALL_PATH","\u0001Deployment||STRIP_INSTALLED_PRODUCT","\u0001Deployment||TARGETED_DEVICE_FAMILY","\u0001Deployment||IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_LSApplicationCategoryType","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_UIApplicationSceneManifest_Generation","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_CFBundleDisplayName","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_NSHumanReadableCopyright","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_UILaunchScreen_Generation","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_UISupportedInterfaceOrientations_iPad","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_UISupportedInterfaceOrientations_iPhone","\u0001Info.plist Values||INFOPLIST_KEY_UIApplicationSupportsIndirectInputEvents","\u0001Linking -
